detective.memberinvitation.CfnAbout: The `AWS::Detective::MemberInvitation` resource is an Amazon Detective resource type that creates an invitation to join a Detective behavior graph. The administrator account can choose whether to send an email notification of the invitation to the root user email address of the AWS account.

detective.memberinvitation.DisableEmailN.Description: Whether to send an invitation email to the member account. If set to true, the member account does not receive an invitation email.

detective.memberinvitation.GraphArn.Description: The ARN of the behavior graph to invite the account to contribute data to.

detective.memberinvitation.MemberEmailAd.Description: The root user email address of the invited account. If the email address provided is not the root user email address for the provided account, the invitation creation fails.

detective.memberinvitation.MemberId.Description: The AWS account identifier of the invited account

detective.memberinvitation.Message.Description: Customized text to include in the invitation email message.
